arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Matheus Cunha links make sense, plus possible loan signing
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha interest makes sense amid Bukayo Saka injury blow It’s still early days for Arsenal obviously in terms of how they are going to deal without the injured Bukayo Saka. They got themselves off to a winning start without that talismanic winger, albeit in pretty unconvincing fashion as they edged past Ipswich 1-0 at the […] The post Arsenal transfer news: Matheus Cunha links make sense, plus possible loan signing appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal face Nico Williams transfer dilemma as FFP boost on the cards
arts.sum: Arsenal maintain an interest in Athletic Bilbao winger Nico Williams, with the 22-year-old within the club’s transfer budget, according to the Daily Mail . The report named Williams as a long-term target for Mikel Arteta, who is targeting attacking reinforcements over the next month as they aim to challenge Liverpool at the top of the table.

arts.ttl: What channel is Brentford vs Arsenal on? How to watch Premier League match in UK
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta needs all three points in New Year's Day's trip to Brentford to stand a chance of winning the Premier League, but the Arsenal boss hasn't always found it easy facing Thomas Frank's Bees

arts.ttl: First Arsenal, now England? Why scouts and FA insiders think 'mega-talent' Myles Lewis-Skelly is destined for the top with bumper new contract on way for Mikel Arteta's breakout star
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: In September at the end of a fractious draw, Haaland saw a 17-year-old intent on squaring up to him and asked, 'who the f*** are you?'. Now he is fully aware.

arts.ttl: Arsenal injuries: Every player out of Brentford game
arts.sum: The latest Arsenal injury news ahead of their New Year's Day Premier League clash at Brentford.

arts.ttl: Arsenal prodigy reveals help and support he gets from Martin Odegaard and Bukayo Saka
arts.sum: Arsenal talent Ethan Nwaneri has named Martin Odegaard and Bukayo Saka as the two senior players who have most helped him settle into the Gunners first-team this season.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres signs, surprise Marcus Rashford move - Arsenal's dream January transfer window - Hannah Pinnock - football.london
arts.sum: Saka's injury aside, Arsenal lack a clinical striker and it's a problem Arteta will need to address either in January or the summer. The January transfer window is here and clubs across the league will be scrambling to improve their squads ahead of the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal told final Dani Olmo decision as January transfer window reality clear
arts.sum: Arsenal have been told that Dani Olmo is not considering a move away from Barcelona, despite the club’s troubles in registering the player. That could potentially free up finances to be able to register Olmo, but it’s now a race against time.

arts.ttl: 10 Arsenal transfers Mikel Arteta could complete as soon as January window opens
arts.sum: From January, players whose contracts expire at the end of the season will be able to negotiate a pre-contract agreement with clubs outside of the country in the league they play in. For Arsenal, this will mean Premier League players are off-limits, so the Gunners won't be able to agree deals for the likes of Mohamed Salah, Kevin De Bruyne, Trent Alexander-Arnold, Son Heung-Min and Virgil van Dijk.

arts.ttl: Arsenal maintain interest in Real Madrid starlet
arts.sum: The brass at Premier League giants Arsenal have maintained their long-standing interest in the signing of Real Madrid starlet Arda Güler. That’s according to transfer insider Sami Mokbel of the…
